name: Broiled Oriental Swordfish
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Swordfish steak, cut into 1 1/4 inch thick pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine lemon juice, soy sauce, olive oil, and ginger.
2. Marinade the swordfish in the mixture for 1 hour in the refrigerator, turning occasionally.
3. Remove the swordfish from the marinade and scrape off any remaining ginger or garlic.
4. Strain the marinade, reserving the liquid separately.
5. Preheat the broiler.
6. Place the swordfish 4 inches from the heat source on a lightly oiled, flat broiling dish. Do not place the fish directly on the broiling rack, as it can break apart.
7. Brush the swordfish with the reserved marinade.
8. Broil the fish until it reaches the desired level of doneness, about 4-5 minutes per side. Do not overcook.
9. Sprinkle with sliced scallion and garnish with lemon halves.
10. Serve immediately.
